event: Pop art image of a glass with dissolving tablet
description: A black and white pop art print in Roy Lichtenstein's signature style, depicting a glass of water with a dissolving effervescent tablet. The tablet creates swirling patterns and bubbles as it dissolves. The image uses bold black outlines and the characteristic Ben-Day dot pattern in the background. The glass is rendered with graphic clarity, showing the fizzing action of the tablet in a stylized, almost comic-book manner. The composition is simple and focused entirely on the single object.
